summary: WebSocket Strategy Alerts feature testing complete. All 8 backend tests passed (REST endpoints + WebSocket connections). All frontend tests passed for Alerts page in demo mode, notification bell, and navigation.
passed_tests: Backend GET /api/alerts/status returns connection statistics (status=active, pro_connections, demo_connections, total)
Backend POST /api/alerts/test broadcasts test alert and returns alert payload with type=strategy_alert
Backend WebSocket /api/ws/alerts/demo-{id} connects and sends 'connected' event with mode='demo'
Backend WebSocket /api/ws/alerts/demo-{id} streams mock 'strategy_alert' events every 10-20 seconds
Backend WebSocket /api/ws/alerts/{user_id}:free sends 'upgrade_required' message then closes with code 4003
Backend WebSocket /api/ws/alerts/{user_id}:pro connects successfully with mode='pro'
Backend WebSocket /api/ws/alerts/{user_id}:elite connects successfully with mode='elite'
Backend WebSocket invalid client_id format rejected with HTTP 403
Frontend /alerts?demo=true page loads with 'Live Alerts' title
Frontend /alerts?demo=true shows 'Live' connection badge (green)
Frontend /alerts?demo=true shows 'Demo Mode' badge
Frontend /alerts?demo=true receives live alert cards within 20 seconds
Frontend alert cards show action badges (LONG/SHORT/CLOSE/TP HIT/SL HIT)
Frontend alert cards show strategy name, asset, confidence, and price
Frontend Clear button clears all alerts
Frontend /alerts without auth or demo mode shows 'Offline' status and doesn't crash
Frontend Navigation shows 'Alerts' link in demo mode
Frontend Notification bell visible at /dashboard?demo=true with unread count badge
Frontend Notification dropdown shows 4 notification items
Frontend Notification dropdown has 'Mark all read' button
critical_code_review_comments: websocket.py: Well-structured WebSocket endpoint with proper demo/pro/free tier handling
websocket.py: Demo mode correctly streams mock alerts every 10-20 seconds
websocket.py: Free user correctly receives upgrade_required message and connection closes with 4003
alerts_manager.py: Clean connection management with async lock for thread safety
useStrategyAlerts.js: Proper WebSocket hook with reconnection logic and cleanup
AlertsPage.jsx: Good UI with action badges, connection status, and clear functionality
NotificationBell.jsx: Integrates with WebSocket alerts and shows live notifications
context_for_next_testing_agent: WebSocket Strategy Alerts feature fully tested. WebSocket URL pattern: wss://alpha-alerts-live.preview.emergentagent.com/api/ws/alerts/{client_id}. Client ID formats: 'demo-{random}' for demo mode, '{user_id}:pro' or '{user_id}:elite' for paid users, '{user_id}:free' for free users (gets upgrade_required then closes). Demo mode streams mock alerts every 10-20 seconds. REST endpoints: GET /api/alerts/status for connection stats, POST /api/alerts/test to broadcast test alert. Frontend: /alerts?demo=true for demo mode alerts page, notification bell shows live alerts in dropdown.

mocked_apis_list: Demo WebSocket /api/ws/alerts/demo-{id} - streams mock strategy alerts every 10-20 seconds

features_tested.demo_websocket_connect: PASS - Connects and sends 'connected' event with mode='demo'
features_tested.demo_websocket_streaming: PASS - Streams mock alerts every 10-20 seconds
features_tested.free_user_websocket: PASS - Sends upgrade_required then closes with 4003
features_tested.alerts_page_demo_mode: PASS - Shows Live Alerts title, Live badge, Demo Mode badge
features_tested.alert_cards_content: PASS - Shows action badges, strategy name, asset, confidence, price
features_tested.alerts_page_no_auth: PASS - Shows Offline status, doesn't crash
features_tested.navigation_alerts_link: PASS - Shows Alerts link in demo mode
features_tested.notification_bell: PASS - Shows unread count and dropdown with notifications
